result.name: RMI Registry Service Detection

nvt.name: RMI Registry Service Detection
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:N/I:N/A:N|summary=Detection of a Remote Method Invocation (RMI) registry service.|insight=|affected=|impact=|solution=|vuldetect=|solution_type=

result.description: A RMI registry service is running at this port.

result.name: RPC Portmapper Service Detection (TCP)

nvt.name: RPC Portmapper Service Detection (TCP)
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:N/I:N/A:N|summary=TCP based detection of a RPC portmapper service.|insight=The RPC portmapper service is an unsecured protocol for Internet facing systems and should only be used on a trusted network segment, otherwise disabled. The software should be patched and configured properly.|affected=|impact=|solution=|vuldetect=|solution_type=

result.description:
Detected RPC Portmapper
Location: 111/tcp CPE: cpe:/a:portmap:portmap
Extra information: Possible known aliases / names for this product are 'port mapper', 'rpc.portmap', 'portmap' or 'rpcbind'

result.name: rsh Service Detection

nvt.name: rsh Service Detection
nvt.tags:
cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:N/I:N/A:N|summary=Checks if the remote host is running a rsh service.
Note: The reporting takes place in a separate VT 'rsh Unencrypted Cleartext Login' (OID: 1.3.6.1.4.1.25623.1.0.100080).|insight=|affected=|impact=|solution=|vuldetect=|solution_type=

result.description: A rsh service is running at this port.

result.name: rsh Unencrypted Cleartext Login

nvt.name: rsh Unencrypted Cleartext Login
nvt.tags:
cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:P/I:P/A:P|summary=This remote host is running a rsh service.|insight=rsh (remote shell) is a command line computer program which can execute shell commands as another user, and on another computer across a computer network.
Remark: NIST don't see 'configuration issues' as software flaws so the referenced CVE has a severity of 0.0. The severity of this VT has been raised by Greenbone to still report a configuration issue on the target.|affected=|impact=|solution=Disable the rsh service and use alternatives like SSH instead.|vuldetect=|solution_type=Mitigation
nvt.solution: Disable the rsh service and use alternatives like SSH instead.

result.description: The rsh service currently has issues with name resolution and is not allowing connections from this host.

result.name: Samba 3.0.0 <= 3.0.25rc3 MS-RPC Remote Shell Command Execution Vulnerability - Active Check

nvt.name: Samba 3.0.0 <= 3.0.25rc3 MS-RPC Remote Shell Command Execution Vulnerability - Active Check
nvt.tags:
cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:M/Au:S/C:P/I:P/A:P|summary=Samba is prone to a vulnerability that allows attackers to execute arbitrary shell commands because the software fails to sanitize user-supplied input.|insight=|affected=Samba versions 3.0.0 through 3.0.25rc3.|impact=An attacker may leverage this issue to execute arbitrary shell commands on an affected system with the privileges of the application.|solution=Updates are available. Please see the referenced vendor advisory.|vuldetect=Sends a crafted SMB request and checks if the target is sending an ICMP Echo Request back to the scanner host.
Note: For a successful detection of this flaw the scanner host needs to be able to directly receive ICMP Echo Requests (Type 8) from the target.|solution_type=VendorFix
nvt.solution: Updates are available. Please see the referenced vendor advisory.

result.description:
By sending a special crafted SMB request it was possible to execute ``ping -p 5f4f70656e564153565431343237375f -c50 192.168.40.7`` on the remote host.
Received answer (ICMP "Data" field):
0x00: 8A 3A 44 6A B5 6D 0B 00 56 54 31 34 32 37 37 5F .:Dj.m..VT14277_ 0x10: 5F 4F 70 65 6E 56 41 53 56 54 31 34 32 37 37 5F _OpenVASVT14277_ 0x20: 5F 4F 70 65 6E 56 41 53 56 54 31 34 32 37 37 5F _OpenVASVT14277_ 0x30: 5F 4F 70 65 6E 56 41 53 _OpenVAS

result.name: Service Detection with 'GET' Request

nvt.name: Service Detection with 'GET' Request
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:N/I:N/A:N|summary=This plugin performs service detection.|insight=This plugin is a complement of the plugin 'Services' (OID: 1.3.6.1.4.1.25623.1.0.10330). It sends a HTTP 'GET' request to the remaining unknown services and tries to identify them.|affected=|impact=|solution=|vuldetect=|solution_type=

result.description: An IRC server seems to be running on this port.

result.name: Service Detection with 'GET' Request

nvt.name: Service Detection with 'GET' Request

It sends a HTTP 'GET' request to the remaining unknown services and tries to identify them.|affected=|impact=|solution=|vuldetect=|solution_type=

result.description: A rsh service seems to be running on this port.

result.name: Service Detection with 'GET' Request

nvt.name: Service Detection with 'GET' Request
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:N/I:N/A:N|summary=This plugin performs service detection.|insight=This plugin is a complement of the plugin 'Services' (OID: 1.3.6.1.4.1.25623.1.0.10330). It sends a HTTP 'GET' request to the remaining unknown services and tries to identify them.|affected=|impact=|solution=|vuldetect=|solution_type=

result.description: A root shell of Metasploitable seems to be running on this port.

result.name: Service Detection with 'GET' Request

nvt.name: Service Detection with 'GET' Request
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:N/I:N/A:N|summary=This plugin performs service detection.|insight=This plugin is a complement of the plugin 'Services' (OID: 1.3.6.1.4.1.25623.1.0.10330). It sends a HTTP 'GET' request to the remaining unknown services and tries to identify them.|affected=|impact=|solution=|vuldetect=|solution_type=

result.description: A Distributed Ruby (dRuby/DRb) service seems to be running on this port.

result.name: Services

nvt.name: Services
nvt.tags: cvss_base_vector=AV:N/AC:L/Au:N/C:N/I:N/A:N|summary=This plugin performs service detection.|insight=This plugin attempts to guess which service is running on the remote port(s). For instance, it searches for a web server which could listen on another port than 80 or 443 and makes this information available for other check routines.|affected=|impact=|solution=|vuldetect=|solution_type=

result.description: An FTP server is running on this port. Here is its banner : 220 ProFTPD 1.3.1 Server (Debian) [::ffff:192.168.40.3]
